ideas.headline: Top-of-stack idea survives hostile re-pass. Buyer reachability is strong — EFKA Governor + GS Social Insurance are named, single-ministry, no inter-ministerial sign-off. Precedent freshness is solid: Caddy is operational and scaling, Albert is being extended via France-Germany sovereign-AI agreement through 2030. Founder-market fit is realistic in Athens — ex-EFKA actuaries exist in private actuar

Strongest international-precedent freshness in the set: Spain's Herramienta Lucha contra el Fraude is operational and being expanded under the 2025-2027 Strategic Labour Inspection Plan; the Spain story is a direct 1:1 analogue for ΣΕΠΕ. Buyer reachability via the ΣΕΠΕ Special Secretary + GS Labour is single-channel and approachable. Pilot procurability is realistic at <€55k single-region for a 12

Highest average in the hostile re-pass. Sister-product to pension-calc copilot — same founder stack, same Greek-legal-corpus moat, same drafting-with-provenance architecture, but a separate buyer (EFKA appeals-directorate head) and a separate budget line. Below the pass bar. Buyer reachability via the ΔΥΠΑ Governor is straightforward and precedent freshness is high — France Travail Albert is operational and being scaled under the France-Germany sovereign-AI agreement. But three axes drag this down. Pilot procurability is weak because the EU AI Act classifies employment-matching by public services as Annex III high-risk, which forces a conformity-as

Hostile re-pass confirms the original 'park' verdict and pushes it toward 'fail'. Buyer reachability is the weakest in the set: a triple champion is required (ΓΓΠΣΨΔ Digital Governance GS for the platform, EFKA Governor for the data, GS Family Policy for the mandate) and ΓΓΠΣΨΔ considers cross-system orchestration their own 2027 roadmap — directly competitive, not adjacent.
